title: Neiva, HU — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Neiva, HU: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Neiva is a city in HU with a population of 350,000. The capital of the Huila department, a hot city in the Magdalena Valley known for its folk music and festivals.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
